pi_items.source: Code analysis of task.json instructions and export_result.sh verification script.

Code analysis and execution: The setup_task.sh script uses a case-sensitive file search ('*.dcm') which fails to find the downloaded sample dataset ('0002.DCM'). Consequently, it always generates synthetic files with PatientName hardcoded as 'Test^Patient'.
Code analysis and execution: Analyzed the synthetic DICOM generator in setup_task.sh which hardcodes ds.PatientID = 'TEST001'.
Code analysis and execution: Analyzed the synthetic DICOM generator in setup_task.sh which hardcodes ds.Rows = 256.
Code analysis and execution: Analyzed the synthetic DICOM generator in setup_task.sh which hardcodes ds.Columns = 256.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires exporting anonymized DICOM files to the destination folder '/home/ga/DICOM/anonymized'. Due to a case-sensitivity issue in the task setup script, it always falls back to generating a synthetic CT scan dataset rather than using downloaded real samples. These synthetic DICOM files have a hardcoded patient name 'Test^Patient', patient ID 'TEST001', and an image dimension of 256x256 rows and columns.
